reviews.comment:
Recomiendo, agua para mate GRATIS
Baños limpios y muchos disponibles con jabón, papel y para secarse las manos. Es el ACA, hay para comer adentro y fuera del lugar.

(Translated by Google)
I recommend the free hot water for mate. The bathrooms are clean and plentiful, with soap, toilet paper, and hand dryers. It's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), and there's food available both inside and outside.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHN05XR2tnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez que paso por esa ruta, es parada obligada, está todo perfecto,  restó,  espacio verde para descansar un poco, los sanitarios impecables siempre

(Translated by Google)
Every time I travel that route, it's a must-stop; everything is perfect: a restaurant, green space to rest a bit, and the restrooms are always spotless.
